sourcesContent:
import React from 'react'
import styled from 'styled-components'
import Section from './Section'

function Home() {
  return (
    <Container>
       <Section 
          title="Model S"
          description="Order Online for Touchless Deli"
       
       />
       <Section />
       <Section />
       <Section />
    </Container>
  )
}

export default Home

const Container = styled.div`
  height:100vh;
`
